reviews.review_title: Best mixed reality game on Quest!
reviews.review_description: I’ve played a ton of mixed reality games on quest and it’s been far my favorite. The quality is next to none, the animations are fun and playful, and it is really fun. Super easy to use and the hand tracking is so good! I kept coming back trying to top my high score. Highly recommend downloading.
I really love how this world builds around you and I love bonking those cheeky little weasels
I ha such fun playing this! The perfect mix of quest, great graphics and cool interactions. Highly recommend!
